summary: Comprehensive testing of Expense Category Master module completed. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId bug in POST endpoints. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified - page loads, stats cards display, accordion layout works, CRUD dialogs open/close, role limits sheet functional.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning: nested button inside AccordionTrigger (radix UI known issue)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/expense-master/categories returns categories with expense_types
Backend: Category structure includes id, name, is_active, expense_types
Backend: POST /api/expense-master/types creates new expense type
Backend: Non-admin users get 403 on POST/PUT/DELETE
Backend: Expense types reference valid categories
Backend: Role limits reference valid role IDs
Frontend: Stats cards show Categories, Expense Types, Roles, Active Categories
Frontend: Accordion layout displays categories with icons and descriptions
Frontend: Expanding category shows expense types table
Frontend: Table has columns: Type, Default Limit, Receipt Required, Justification, Status, Role Limits
Frontend: Policy Guidelines displayed when category expanded
Frontend: Add Category button opens dialog
Frontend: Add Category dialog has all form fields
Frontend: Add Expense Type button visible inside expanded category
Frontend: Role Limits button opens sheet with role configuration
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in /app/backend/routes/expense_master.py - POST endpoints now exclude _id from response
seed_data_creation: Default expense categories and types auto-initialized on first access
context_for_next_testing_agent: Expense Category Master module fully functional. Backend routes at /api/expense-master/*. Frontend at /expense-category-master. Auto-initializes with 8 default categories and ~30 expense types with role-based limits. Cookie-based auth required. Fixed ObjectId bug in POST responses.

bug_fixed.issue: POST /api/expense-master/categories and POST /api/expense-master/types returning 500 Internal Server Error
bug_fixed.root_cause: MongoDB insert_one() adds _id field to the document dict which includes ObjectId type that cannot be JSON serialized
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed return statements to exclude _id field: return {k: v for k, v in data.items() if k != '_id'}
